testcase.name: test_generate_rfp_full_flow

failure.message:
AssertionError: RFP generation failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfp_generator.py:168: in test_generate_rfp_full_flow assert response.status_code == 200, f"RFP generation failed: {response.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: RFP generation failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_rfp_different_tones

failure.message: AssertionError: RFP generation with Formal tone failed assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfp_generator.py:224: in test_generate_rfp_different_tones assert response.status_code == 200, f"RFP generation with {tone} tone failed" E AssertionError: RFP generation with Formal tone failed E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_rfp_response_structure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfp_generator.py:245: in test_generate_rfp_response_structure assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
